examples: This shamisen, originating in Okinawa, is a banjo-like three-stringed instrument that is played with a plectrum.
The seal on the frosted bottle of Zubrowka was broken with a click—of plectrum on fingernail.
A Japanese instrument resembling a banjo, having a very long neck and three strings played with a plectrum.
The hollow body, made of mulberry wood, is shaped in the form of a figure eight and is held horizontally, while the eleven metal strings are plucked with a plectrum.
